popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
CONAN de Rennes, son of JUDICAËL [Juhael] Comte de Rennes & his wife Gerberge --- (-killed in
battle Conquereil 27 Jun 992).  The Chronicle of Nantes names "Conano filio Judicael Berengarii Redonensi …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Conan Ier de Rennes duc de Bretagne於0944年出生在法國布列塔尼時，他的父親Juhel Bérenger de Rennes70歲，母親Gerberge de Nantes23歲。他和Ermengarde d'Anjou至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於0992年6月27日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可康奎易爾享年48歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼莫比韓沙吉米爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Renne  .
English and Irish: variant of   Rainey  .

nameMeanings.name: Conan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Conán . In historical times, the name was borne by a 7th-century saint, bishop of the Isle of Man.  Sir Arthur Conan Doyle  (  1859–1930 ), creator of  Sherlock Holmes , was born in Edinburgh, of Irish stock. The science-fiction creation Conan the Destroyer owes more to the villain of legend than to the bishop or the writer. For the most part this name is of Irish origin; however, it was in use in Yorkshire, especially among the Askes and the Bartons, from the 12th to the 16th centuries. In this case, the name was derived from Conan, Earl of Richmond, and is of Breton origin.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Conan Ier de Rennes duc de Bretagne was born in 0944, in Brittany, France, his father, Juhel Bérenger de Rennes, was 70 and his mother, Gerberge de Nantes, was 23. He had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Ermengarde d'Anjou. He died on 27 June 0992, in Conquereuil, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 48, and was buried in Saint-Michel, Morbihan, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Conan Ier de Rennes duc de Bretagne est né en 0944, à Bretagne, France, son père, Juhel Bérenger de Rennes, avait 70 ans et sa mère, Gerberge de Nantes, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Ermengarde d'Anjou. Il est décédé le 27 juin 0992, à Conquereuil, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Michel, Morbihan, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Conan Ier de Rennes duc de Bretagne 0944 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Juhel Bérenger de Rennes 70 und seine Mutter Gerberge de Nantes 23. Er hatte mit Ermengarde d'Anjou mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. Juni 0992 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Conquereuil, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Michel, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Conan Ier de Rennes duc de Bretagne è nato il nel 0944 nel Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Juhel Bérenger de Rennes, aveva 70 anni e il suo madre, Gerberge de Nantes, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Ermengarde d'Anjou. Morì il 27 giugno 0992, nel Conquereuil, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Michel, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Conan Ier de Rennes duc de Bretagneが0944年にフランスブレタグンで生まれた時，父Juhel Bérenger de Rennesは70歳，母Gerberge de Nantesは23歳であった。彼はErmengarde d'Anjouとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は0992年6月27日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティクコンクエレウイルで48歳で死去し，フランスブレタグンモービハンサイント-ミチェルにて埋葬された。

ko.Conquereuil, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de l: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 콘크레우일
ko.lifeSummary: Conan Ier de Rennes duc de Bretagne(이)가 0944년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Juhel Bérenger de Rennes(은)는 70세였고, 그의 어머니 Gerberge de Nantes(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Ermengarde d'Anjou(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 0992년 6월 27일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 콘크레우일에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 세인트-믹헬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Conan Ier de Rennes duc de Bretagne nasceu em 0944, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Juhel Bérenger de Rennes, tinha 70 anos e sua mãe, Gerberge de Nantes, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Ermengarde d'Anjou. Ele faleceu em 27 de junho de 0992, em Conquereuil, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, França, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Michel, Morbihan, Bretagne, França.

ru.Conquereuil, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de l: конкуиреуил, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Conan Ier de Rennes duc de Bretagne родился в 0944 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Juhel Bérenger de Rennes было 70 лет, а матери, которую звали Gerberge de Nantes, 23. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Ermengarde d'Anjou. Он умер 27 июня 0992 г. в местности конкуиреуил, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-мишел, морбихань, бретагн, Франция.

Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Ermengarde d'Anjou. Murió el 27 de junio de 0992, en Conquereuil, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Michel, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia.
